title: Ethora Steam Age
description: A minecraft modpack for 1.21.1 neoforge focusing on create and building
body:
# Ethora S3 
![ETHORA steam age SMP](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5686adbf0d832926ae1f976d07f268ab269eb869.png)
ethora Steam Age is a create centered modpack for usage on the minecraft server ethora using the create 6.0 update.
this allows you to build almost anything weather it be mechanical or just a nice decoration or maybe you want to build a zoo for all the new mobs all of this is possible

#### **SO BUILD ANYTHING AND EVERYTHING**

### Mods
Ethora Steam Age contains some optimization mods allowing you to build what you want with less limitations,  

this modpack has a major focus on the create mod and some of its many addons with a couple of building mods aswell. it also includes some farming mods such as farmers delight and some of its addons aswell serene seasons so prepare yourself for winter with machines.

### Visual Enhancements
Ethora Steam Age contains some visual mods such as iris allowing you to play with shaders aswell as explosive enhancements, new animations, and some updates to rain adding new sounds

### Creatures
Ethora Steam Age has a couple mods adding new peacful mobs aswell as variants on some pre-existing creatures

### Create and its addons
this modpack expects you to already have a understanding of how these mods work as it has no extra information for learning them other than the documentation included in the create mod. and not all of the included addons include documentation which means you will need a understanding of the base version of 

### Extras
this Modpack contains the resource pack fresh animations quivers
https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations-quivers

this Modpack contains the mod Cosmetic Armour Reworked
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-reworked
